plugins.name: midwestern-brand-application
plugins.description: Automatically apply Midwestern Interactive brand standards to any visual or client-facing output created in Claude

plugins.name: executive-social-manager
plugins.description: LinkedIn ghostwriting workflow for up to 10 executives. Multiple entry points: /draft (quick), /react (article response), /qa (polish existing drafts), 3-phase research pipeline (deep-dive). Automated QA pipeline (fact-check + Voice DNA + anti-AI humanization), single human review gate, formatted output.
